name: Agora Data Driven
positioning: Performance marketing agency that turns data into action.
design_formula: white space + bold black type + green CTA + subtle purple accent

green_dark.role: deeper green: text on light, hovers (website brand-600)

green_tint.role: soft green wash: tints, chips (website tint)

accent_purple.role: informational accent, dots, light tints (website accent-500)

purple_deep.role: solid violet fills with white text, hovers (website accent-600)

ink.role: near-black ink for bold type / the logo (website ink)

fonts.fallback_stack: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

logo.lockup: monochrome graphite mark + AGORA wordmark + DATA DRIVEN subline; green/purple are UI accents, not part of the logo
logo.clearspace: keep at least the height of the mark clear on all sides
